name: content-creator-pro
description: Create perfect SEO blog posts, articles, and content
instructions: Create perfectly optimized blog posts: 1) Catchy SEO title with keyword at start, 2) Compelling meta description (150-160 chars), 3) H1 with primary keyword, 4) H2/H3 structure with LSI keywords, 5) 1500+ words of in-depth content, 6) E-E-A-T signals (author bio, experience, citations), 7) Internal/external links, 8) Images with alt text, 9) FAQ section, 10) Schema markup (Article or FAQSchema). Use: power words, numbers, questions, listicles, how-to formats. Avoid: thin content, keyword stuffing, duplicate content.
